palette_hint: Deep slate background #0d1117, primary text #e8e6e1, accent teal #00b8a2, secondary accent amber #f5a623
type_style: Headings in Georgia serif at 700 weight, body in system-ui at 400/500, tight tracking on labels, clinical yet warm feel
description: Oblique Flux Studio is a boutique brand strategy and digital experience agency specializing in science, technology, and cultural institutions.
constraints: Fixed left sidebar 240px wide with site nav and current-page indicator; main content area scrolls independently with min-width 0
Work page uses a 3-column CSS grid with mixed-span cards (some cards span 2 columns); grid gap 24px, max-width 1200px
Services page uses a two-column layout: 320px sticky filter/category sidebar on the left, scrollable service cards on the right
All section headings use a teal #00b8a2 left border 4px solid with 16px left padding; body text size 15px line-height 1.7
Contact page includes a dense two-column form grid alongside a 280px info sidebar listing office addresses, phone, and timezone data in a small table

page_specs.work: Displays 12 case study cards in a 3-column CSS grid where the first and fifth cards span 2 columns; each card contains a project title, client name, discipline tags (e.g. 'Brand Identity', 'UX Research'), year, and a solid color thumbnail block using palette accent colors. A sticky top bar within the main area shows active filter pills for disciplines like 'Wayfinding', 'Digital', 'Print', 'Strategy'.
page_specs.services: Left sidebar (320px, sticky top 0) lists 8 service categories as clickable filter labels with counts in amber badges; main area renders each service as a two-row card with a bold service name, a 2-sentence description, typical deliverables as a comma-separated inline list, and a starting price range. Categories include Brand Architecture, Editorial Design, Environmental Graphics, UX Audit, Motion Identity, Content Strategy, Accessibility Review, and Research Synthesis.
page_specs.studio: Three-column layout: a narrow 200px left column with a vertical timeline of studio milestones (2011–2024), a wide center column with studio philosophy text broken into 4 titled sections, and a 220px right column listing 14 team members in a compact card grid with name, role, and a two-letter monogram avatar in teal. A full-width banner at the top displays the studio's founding statement in large Georgia serif.
page_specs.process: A two-column layout with a sticky left column (280px) showing a numbered phase navigation (Discovery, Define, Design, Develop, Deploy, Debrief) that highlights the active phase; the right scrollable column renders each phase as a dense content block with phase title, duration estimate, key activities as a 4-column icon-label grid, outputs list, and a client responsibility callout box in amber. A summary table at page bottom compares all 6 phases across 5 attributes.
page_specs.contact: Split layout with a 280px right sidebar containing a small HTML table of three office locations (New York, Berlin, Melbourne) with address, phone, and UTC offset, plus social handle labels. The main area holds a two-column form grid with fields for name, organization, project type (select), budget range (select), timeline, message textarea, and a referral source radio group; a teal submit button spans full width below. A thin horizontal rule separates a new-business enquiry section from a press/speaking section above the form.
